system.description: Frontier scientist who mixes fieldcraft, old-world knowledge, and practical technology in equal measure.
system.notes: Play the character as a tough explorer who treats science as something to carry into the ruins, not lock in a lab.

grantedAbilities.name: Field Researcher
grantedAbilities.notes: Use the class to read ruins, classify finds, and keep useful records even when the expedition is operating far from civilization.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Hand to Hand counts as an other skill. Basic costs one selection, Expert costs two, Martial Arts costs three, and Assassin costs four.

unresolvedNotes: At least four related skills must be chosen from Science.
Roll starting money and saleable artifacts from the class text.
The opening weapon loadout includes extra weapons beyond the fixed W.P. Energy Rifle and should still be chosen manually.

system.description: Ordinary wanderer with little formal training but enough grit to grow into trouble and opportunity alike.
system.notes: Play the character as someone making it up as they go, learning fast, and surviving on nerve, luck, and a broad mix of simple skills.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak American and one additional language at 90%.

grantedAbilities.name: Make Do With What You Have
grantedAbilities.notes: The character starts light on formal training, so lean on broad skill picks, common sense, and whatever gear can be scrounged.

unresolvedNotes: The class begins with American plus one other language at 90%; choose the second language manually.
Roll starting money from the class text.
This class uses a broad general-skill progression rather than a deep fixed package.

system.description: Trailwise hunter and scout who knows how to survive, track, and travel where most people would be lost by sundown.
system.notes: Use the class as the party guide, outrider, and wilderness problem-solver whenever the road disappears.

grantedAbilities.name: Scout Toughness
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll the class S.D.C. and P.E. bonus from the class text during character creation and apply the results to the character.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Start with Hand to Hand: Basic. Upgrade to Expert by spending one other skill, or to Martial Arts or Assassin by spending two.

unresolvedNotes: At least three related skills must be chosen from Physical and one from Wilderness.
Roll the class S.D.C. and P.E. bonus during character creation.
Roll starting money from either the typical scout or mercenary scout option in the class text.
